lessons: Shield has a 14% win rate (9/64) — lowest of all weapons; avoid using it unless forced, especially against staff or bow users.
Staff users (Reaper, HexMind, Archmage) killed you 5 times in last 10 rounds — retreat or flank when they are not in cover; never engage head-on.
Sword users (Warden, Executioner, Lancer, Andrew-Test) killed you 4 times but you killed 11 — they are your most vulnerable targets; prioritize them aggressively.
Fortress (shield) has 0 kills vs you in last 10 rounds and 134 total deaths — they are low-threat; target them first when spotted.
Teleport_surge modifier improved your KD to 6:0 — aggressively push and secure kills during this modifier; it favors your playstyle.
Grapple users (Hook, Scorpion) have 196 total kills vs you — avoid open areas; use walls and corners to break their pull chains.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Sword users are the most frequently killed enemies (11 kills in last 10 rounds) and have the lowest threat profile among high-frequency opponents.
